body: Baseline test note: tests are skipped whenever CI exists; run through PowerShell with `$env:CI=$null; .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon test ...`. Current baseline AlertEventServiceTest has 1 failure: createEventAttachesEvidenceClipToExistingEvent NeverWantedButInvoked at line 211 because enqueue is currently invoked; delivery changes/tests should resolve/update expected side-channel behavior deliberately.
